cns_mpo.interpretation_guard: CNS-MPO is a physicochemical design-space desirability score (Wager 2010). It is not measured brain permeability, not a probability of CNS exposure, and not an NEBPI class. It cannot satisfy any NEBPI Part-II branch.

delivery.rationale: FIXTURE: the effect requires target engagement in brain parenchyma.
FIXTURE: same mechanism, high-dose IV context.

exposure.margin_transform: margin = (40 nM x 1 = 4E+1 nM) / (100 nM x 1 = 1E+2 nM); both free; potency metric = MEC
margin = (5000 nM x 1 = 5E+3 nM) / (100 nM x 1 = 1E+2 nM); both free; potency metric = MEC

counterfactual.hard_rule: Absent or unknown evidence is never 'impermeable'.

adequately assess PD in NEB and observe none
adequately assess radiographic response in NEB and observe none

adequately assess PD in NEB and observe none
adequately assess radiographic response in NEB and observe none

transporters.unqualified_boolean_note: Deliberately null. A transporter interaction is qualified by assay, species and biological system; 'is a P-gp substrate: true' discards exactly the qualifications that make the observation interpretable.

provenance_chain.transform: NEBPI Part-II branch logic over the criterion observations listed in evidence_observation_ids

guards: CNS MPO >= 4 does not mean the drug is brain-penetrant.
CNS MPO is not a measured brain concentration and not Kp,uu,brain.
CNS MPO is not a probability.
CNS MPO alone can never produce an NEBPI Part-II class (see nebpi_grossman2026_v1.json; physicochemical characteristics are a Part-I input, not a Part-II branch).
No imputation: if any of the six inputs is absent, non-finite, or sourced from a disallowed calculator, the score is incomplete and the total is null.
not_evaluated can never satisfy 'No relevant PD in NEB' or 'No radiographic response in NEB'.
A PK branch without a known MEC/potency context is context_incomplete and satisfies nothing.

no_evidence_found MUST NOT render as 'safe', 'no risk', 'negative' or a green state. It is a statement about the SEARCH, not about the drug. Every emitted row carries renders_as_safe=false and an explicit display_text saying so.
not_evaluated MUST NOT render as no_evidence_found.
signal_only can never establish incidence, causality, safety or a contraindication.

ordering.note: Candidates are listed side by side in a non-evaluative order. Stage 4 does not rank.

calculator_mixing.note: All candidates used the same calculator for each property.

set_level.lanes_are_independent: delivery, cns_mpo, transporters, exposure, nebpi and safety are separate lanes. There is no combined score, and none is derivable from this document.

stage3_contract_status.assessment_is_not_promotion: A Stage-4 assessment computes PK/safety properties. It is not biological promotion and not a recommendation.
stage3_contract_status.internal_form_note: Stage3DrugCandidateSet is the Stage-4-internal normalized form, NOT Stage 3's wire format. Stage 3's real schema is spot.stage03_drug_annotation.v1.
stage3_contract_status.stage3_freeze_note: Stage 3 is schema-corrected but NOT frozen. Stage 4 is pinned to the r5 contract and refuses anything else.
